texto: Our emotions are the continuous waves and undercurrents that enable us to flow but in some instances, when hold on to them, suppress them or repress them, or express the destructively, they disrupt the flow
explicacao: Citação de Mavis Mazhura sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our emotions are the continuous waves and undercurrents that enable us to flow but in some instan…” articula reflexao, emotions, continuous em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
